mapper.select: select tr.tenant_id as tenant_id, tr.request_id as request_id, ji.id as job_instance_id from batch.trigger_request tr join batch.job_instance ji on ji.tenant_id = tr.tenant_id and ji.dedup_key = tr.dedup_key where tr.request_status = 'ACCEPTED' and tr.related_job_instance_id is null and tr.created_at < #{olderThan} -- audit fix(HIGH-1 静默丢作业):只回写"真正派发过"的实例。launch 的 T1(建 instance=CREATED)与 -- T2(派发 partition/outbox + 推进状态)分属两段独立事务;若 T2 崩溃,instance 滞留 CREATED 且零 -- partition。原查询不过滤状态,会把这种滞留实例也 JOIN 进来、经 reconcileLaunched 谎报成 LAUNCHED, -- 掩盖"作业从未真跑"。排除 CREATED 后,滞留实例保留为陈旧 ACCEPTED → 进入 ADR-010 既定的"过期 -- ACCEPTED 告警 + 人工/恢复"路径,而非被静默闭环。 and ji.instance_status <> 'CREATED' order by tr.id asc limit #{limit}
mapper.update: update batch.trigger_request set request_status = 'LAUNCHED', related_job_instance_id = #{jobInstanceId}, updated_at = current_timestamp where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and request_id = #{requestId} and request_status = 'ACCEPTED' and related_job_instance_id is null
